description: Reconstruct a historical telemetry loss event in GPredict by simulating a specific satellite pass. Configure a ground station named 'Tromso' (69.6625 N, 18.9408 E, 130m) and a tracking module named 'Incident_Recon' containing SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849) and DMSP 5D-3 F18 / USA 210 (NORAD 35951). The 'Incident_Recon' module must use the Tromso ground station and the application must display UTC time. Set the simulation time for this module to February 28, 2026, at 14:30:00 UTC with real-time tracking disabled. Save a screenshot of the desktop showing the map and time configuration to /home/ga/incident_reconstruction.png. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
